category_sources: source_facts.description says KraftKit builds and uses customized ultra-lightweight unikernel VMs; official Unikraft docs and GitHub describe KraftKit/kraft as Unikraft tooling.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is unikraft/kraftkit; official Unikraft docs refer to KraftKit and the kraft CLI.
docs_sources: Official Unikraft CLI documentation is the dedicated documentation surface for KraftKit/kraft.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/unikraft/kraftkit; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Unikraft documentation describe building and using unikernel VMs with the kraft CLI.
